title: kubectl Tooling
description: kubectl Tooling documents overview material for kubectl in the infrastructure domain. It is classified as an operation page for the tool class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights kubectl, krew, ctx, ns, and ksniff, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include krew, tooling, kubectl tooling, infrastructure, and kubernetes, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is infrastructure / kubernetes / kubectl / overview, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
